title: Clinical scales in autoimmune encephalitis-A retrospective monocentric cohort study.
author: Macher S Bsteh G Hoftberger R Berger T Rommer P Zrzavy T
content:
S-EPMC10578879 PMC10578879 Clinical scales in autoimmune encephalitis-A retrospective monocentric cohort study.

Objective

Assessing severity of antibody-mediated encephalitis (AE) or paraneoplastic encephalitis (PE) requires valid and reliable scores to guide treatment decisions and predict
